code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from"react";import Table from"./components/Table";import{ToastContainer}from"react-toastify";import"react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css";import"./App.css";import{io}from"socket.io-client";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[userName,setUserName]=useState("");const[socket,setSocket]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{const stored=localStorage.getItem("recruiterName");if(stored)setUserName(stored);else{let name="";while(!name)name=prompt("Enter your name:");setUserName(name);localStorage.setItem("recruiterName",name);}},[]);useEffect(()=>{const s=io();setSocket(s);return()=>s.disconnect();},[]);if(!userName)return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"app-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Recruitment Requisitions"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Table,{currentUser:userName,socket:socket}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ToastContainer,{position:"top-right",autoClose:3000})]});}export default App;
